Rio Linda, California

The Rio Pub
Your Local
Watering Hole

Cold drafts, bold burgers, and a reason to come back every night — trivia, karaoke, bingo, and more.

See the Menu What's On
Scroll

Kitchen & Bar

Real Food.
Bold Flavors.

Fresh burgers, crispy wings, and pub favorites that keep regulars coming back. Full bar, cold drafts, and $4 well drink deals on Mondays.

Western BBQ Bacon BurgerCrispy bacon, tangy BBQ, caramelized onion rings
Buffalo WingsCrispy & golden — Buffalo, BBQ, or Garlic Parm
Deep Fried Pickle ChipsTangy dill with a seasoned golden crunch
Grilled Cheese SandwichThick-cut, buttered, served with fries
Full Menu & Order Online

Weekly Events

Never a Dull Night.

Mondays

$4 Well Drink Night

Kick the week off right. $4 well drinks all night long.

Wednesdays

Trivia Night

Team up and test your brains. Gift cards on the line, new theme every week.

Thursdays

Bingo Bonanza

Several games, multiple chances to win. Scream BINGO and claim your prize.

Fridays & Saturdays

Karaoke Night

Unleash your inner star. Big song selection, great crowd, zero judgment.

Sundays

Sunday Funday

Sundays are back. Unwind with good people and better drinks.

Special Events

Paint & Sip

Art nights with Ruthie, DJ nights, and special events all year long.

Since 2023

Rio Linda's Favorite
Watering Hole

The Rio Pub is a Sacramento Favorites winner and SMF Award recipient — a true neighborhood institution on Front St. Cold drafts, a full kitchen, and a staff that knows your name.

2+
Sac Favorites Awards
5
Nights a Week
